What We Do

SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Decades of Atlanta Electrical Expertise

Cariboo Industrial Electric was founded over a decade ago by seasoned electricians who saw a need for specialized expertise in the Atlanta commercial sector. We're not a jack-of-all-trades; we focus on delivering top-tier industrial and commercial electrical services, handling the complexities others can't.

Our approach is simple: understand the unique needs of each client, develop a robust plan, and execute with precision. We prioritize safety above all else, adhering to the highest industry standards and local codes. From initial consultation to project completion, we maintain open communication and transparency.

We're deeply invested in the Atlanta community. We actively support local vocational programs, mentoring aspiring electricians and contributing to a skilled workforce. We believe in building strong relationships with our clients and partners, fostering growth and prosperity for the region.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Cariboo Industrial Electric

Expert Technicians

Our team comprises licensed and experienced electricians, well-versed in commercial and industrial electrical systems.

24/7 Emergency Service

Electrical problems don't wait for business hours. We offer round-the-clock emergency support to minimize downtime.

Safety First

We adhere to strict safety protocols and prioritize the well-being of our team and your property.

Guaranteed Workmanship

We stand behind our work with a solid guarantee, ensuring your complete satisfaction.

Get a Free Electrical Estimate

Discuss your project with our experts and receive a detailed, no-obligation estimate.

Get a Free Estimate Call +14047131926

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Cariboo Industrial Electric did a fantastic job installing the electrical system for our new restaurant in Midtown. They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work was outstanding. Highly recommended!

Michael B. Commercial Electrical Installation
“

Our generator failed during a power outage, and Cariboo Industrial Electric came to the rescue. They arrived quickly, diagnosed the problem, and had the generator running again in no time. Their 24/7 emergency service is a lifesaver!

Sarah K. Generator Repair
“

We recently upgraded our electrical panel with Cariboo Industrial Electric. The process was smooth and efficient. The team was professional and answered all of our questions. Very pleased with the results.

David L. Electrical Panel Upgrade
“

Cariboo Industrial Electric transformed our office space with their expert lighting design and installation services. The new lighting is more energy-efficient, brighter, and creates a much more pleasant work environment.

Jessica M. Lighting Design & Installation
“

Cariboo Industrial Electric did an excellent job running new data cables throughout our building. The team was professional, organized, and completed the project on time and within budget. Our network is now faster and more reliable.

Robert P. Data Cabling
“

We hired Cariboo Industrial Electric for routine electrical maintenance, and they did a thorough job inspecting our systems. They identified a potential problem with a transformer and fixed it before it caused a major outage. Very professional!

Ashley G. Electrical Maintenance

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of commercial properties do you service?
We serve a wide range of commercial properties, including office buildings, retail spaces, restaurants, warehouses, and industrial facilities.
Do you handle electrical permits?
Yes, we manage all necessary electrical permits and inspections to ensure compliance with local regulations.
What is the typical turnaround time for a commercial installation?
Turnaround time varies depending on the scope and complexity of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.
